<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" 
                  xmlns:inv="http://schemas.quickbooks.com/invoice">
   <soapenv:Header/>
   <soapenv:Body>
      <inv:CreateInvoiceRequest>
         <inv:InvoiceNumber>QB-INV-2026-789</inv:InvoiceNumber>
         <inv:CustomerId>CUST-12345</inv:CustomerId>
         <inv:CustomerName>Acme Corporation</inv:CustomerName>
         <inv:InvoiceDate>2026-02-05</inv:InvoiceDate>
         <inv:DueDate>2026-03-05</inv:DueDate>
         <inv:PaymentTerms>Net 30</inv:PaymentTerms>
         <inv:LineItems>
            <inv:LineItem>
               <inv:ItemId>SVC-001</inv:ItemId>
               <inv:Description>Professional Services - January 2026</inv:Description>
               <inv:Quantity>40</inv:Quantity>
               <inv:Rate>125.00</inv:Rate>
               <inv:Amount>5000.00</inv:Amount>
            </inv:LineItem>
            <inv:LineItem>
               <inv:ItemId>SVC-002</inv:ItemId>
               <inv:Description>Consulting Services - January 2026</inv:Description>
               <inv:Quantity>20</inv:Quantity>
               <inv:Rate>150.00</inv:Rate>
               <inv:Amount>3000.00</inv:Amount>
            </inv:LineItem>
         </inv:LineItems>
         <inv:Subtotal currency="EUR">8000.00</inv:Subtotal>
         <inv:TaxRate>19.0</inv:TaxRate>
         <inv:TaxAmount currency="EUR">1520.00</inv:TaxAmount>
         <inv:TotalAmount currency="EUR">9520.00</inv:TotalAmount>
         <inv:Notes>Payment due within 30 days</inv:Notes>
      </inv:CreateInvoiceRequest>
   </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" 
                  xmlns:sap="http://schemas.sap.com/invoice">
    <soapenv:Header/>
    <soapenv:Body>
        <sap:CreateInvoiceRequest>
            <sap:InvoiceHeader>
                <sap:InvoiceNumber>SAP-INV-2026-100</sap:InvoiceNumber>
                <sap:InvoiceType>ZF01</sap:InvoiceType>
                <sap:SalesOrganization>1000</sap:SalesOrganization>
                <sap:DistributionChannel>10</sap:DistributionChannel>
                <sap:Division>00</sap:Division>
                <sap:CompanyCode>1000</sap:CompanyCode>
            </sap:InvoiceHeader>
            <sap:CustomerData>
                <sap:CustomerId>SAP-12345</sap:CustomerId>
                <sap:CustomerName>Acme Corporation GmbH</sap:CustomerName>
                <sap:CustomerEmail>billing@acme.com</sap:CustomerEmail>
                <sap:BillingAddress>
                    <sap:Street>Alexanderplatz 1</sap:Street>
                    <sap:City>Berlin</sap:City>
                    <sap:PostalCode>10178</sap:PostalCode>
                    <sap:Country>DE</sap:Country>
                </sap:BillingAddress>
            </sap:CustomerData>
            <sap:InvoiceDetails>
                <sap:InvoiceDate>2026-02-05</sap:InvoiceDate>
                <sap:DueDate>2026-03-05</sap:DueDate>
                <sap:PaymentTerms>0001</sap:PaymentTerms>
                <sap:PaymentTermsDescription>Net 30 days</sap:PaymentTermsDescription>
                <sap:Currency>EUR</sap:Currency>
            </sap:InvoiceDetails>
            <sap:LineItems>
                <sap:LineItem>
                    <sap:ItemNumber>10</sap:ItemNumber>
                    <sap:MaterialNumber>MAT-001</sap:MaterialNumber>
                    <sap:MaterialDescription>S/4HANA Enterprise License</sap:MaterialDescription>
                    <sap:Quantity>1</sap:Quantity>
                    <sap:UnitOfMeasure>EA</sap:UnitOfMeasure>
                    <sap:UnitPrice>5000.00</sap:UnitPrice>
                    <sap:NetAmount>5000.00</sap:NetAmount>
                    <sap:TaxCode>V1</sap:TaxCode>
                    <sap:TaxRate>19.0</sap:TaxRate>
                    <sap:TaxAmount>950.00</sap:TaxAmount>
                    <sap:GrossAmount>5950.00</sap:GrossAmount>
                </sap:LineItem>
                <sap:LineItem>
                    <sap:ItemNumber>20</sap:ItemNumber>
                    <sap:MaterialNumber>MAT-002</sap:MaterialNumber>
                    <sap:MaterialDescription>Implementation Services</sap:MaterialDescription>
                    <sap:Quantity>80</sap:Quantity>
                    <sap:UnitOfMeasure>HR</sap:UnitOfMeasure>
                    <sap:UnitPrice>150.00</sap:UnitPrice>
                    <sap:NetAmount>12000.00</sap:NetAmount>
                    <sap:TaxCode>V1</sap:TaxCode>
                    <sap:TaxRate>19.0</sap:TaxRate>
                    <sap:TaxAmount>2280.00</sap:TaxAmount>
                    <sap:GrossAmount>14280.00</sap:GrossAmount>
                </sap:LineItem>
            </sap:LineItems>
            <sap:InvoiceTotals>
                <sap:NetTotal>17000.00</sap:NetTotal>
                <sap:TaxTotal>3230.00</sap:TaxTotal>
                <sap:GrossTotal>20230.00</sap:GrossTotal>
                <sap:Currency>EUR</sap:Currency>
            </sap:InvoiceTotals>
            <sap:AdditionalData>
                <sap:Reference>
                    <sap:ReferenceType>PO</sap:ReferenceType>
                    <sap:ReferenceNumber>PO-2026-5678</sap:ReferenceNumber>
                </sap:Reference>
                <sap:BillingDocument>9000012345</sap:BillingDocument>
                <sap:SalesOrder>SO-2026-001</sap:SalesOrder>
                <sap:Notes>Standard billing terms apply</sap:Notes>
            </sap:AdditionalData>
        </sap:CreateInvoiceRequest>
    </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>
